test-method.name: verifyBannerIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify banner/carousel is visible

test-method.name: verifyDealsAreVisible
test-method.description: Verify Today's Deals section is visible

exception.message: Deals section is not visible! expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Deals section is not visible! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.flipkart.tests.HomePageTest.verifyDealsAreVisible(HomePageTest.java:60) at test-method.name: verifyFooterIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify footer is present

test-method.name: verifyHomePageLoads
test-method.description: Verify homepage loads successfully

test-method.name: verifyLoginButtonIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify login button is visible

test-method.name: verifyLogoClickRedirectsToHomePage
test-method.description: Verify Flipkart logo click redirects to homepage

test-method.name: verifyLogoIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify Flipkart logo is visible

test-method.name: verifyNavCategoriesAreDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify top navigation categories are displayed

test-method.name: verifyPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify page title is correct

test-method.name: verifySearchBarIsVisible
test-method.description: Verify search bar is present

test-method.name: verifyClickingProductNavigates
test-method.description: Click first product and verify navigation

test-method.name: verifyConsistentResults
test-method.description: Search same keyword twice — consistent results

test-method.name: verifyPricesDisplayed
test-method.description: Verify prices shown in search results

test-method.name: verifyResultCountIsGreaterThanZero
test-method.description: Verify search result count is greater than 0

exception.message: Result count should be > 0! expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Result count should be > 0! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: verifySearchSuggestionsAppear
test-method.description: Verify search suggestions appear while typing

test-method.name: verifySearchUsingEnterKey
test-method.description: Search using Enter key

test-method.name: verifySearchWithInvalidKeyword
test-method.description: Search invalid keyword and verify no results

test-method.name: verifySearchWithNumbers
test-method.description: Search with numbers only

test-method.name: verifySearchWithSpaces
test-method.description: Search with spaces and verify results

test-method.name: verifySearchWithSpecialCharacters
test-method.description: Search with special characters

test-method.name: verifySearchWithValidKeyword
test-method.description: Search valid product and verify results load

test-method.name: verifyUrlContainsKeyword
test-method.description: Verify URL updates with search keyword

test-method.name: verifyBrandFilterApplied
test-method.description: Apply brand filter and verify results

test-method.name: verifyClearAllFilters
test-method.description: Clear all filters and verify reset

test-method.name: verifyClickProductOpensDetailPage
test-method.description: Click product opens detail page

test-method.name: verifyMultipleFiltersApplied
test-method.description: Apply multiple filters simultaneously

test-method.name: verifyNextPage
test-method.description: Go to next page and verify products

test-method.name: verifyPagination
test-method.description: Verify pagination works

test-method.name: verifyPriceFilterApplied
test-method.description: Apply price filter and verify results

exception.message: Products should display after price filter! expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Products should display after price filter! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: verifyBackNavigationFromCart
test-method.description: Verify back navigation works from cart

test-method.name: verifyCartAccessibleFromSearch
test-method.description: Verify cart accessible from search page

test-method.name: verifyCartIconClickNavigates
test-method.description: Verify cart icon click navigates to cart

test-method.name: verifyCartIconVisible
test-method.description: Verify cart icon is visible in header

test-method.name: verifyCartPageLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify cart page loads within 5 seconds

test-method.name: verifyCartPageLoads
test-method.description: Verify cart page loads successfully

test-method.name: verifyCartPageRefresh
test-method.description: Verify cart page persists after refresh

test-method.name: verifyCartPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify cart page has correct title

test-method.name: verifyCartUrl
test-method.description: Verify cart page URL is correct

test-method.name: verifyContinueShoppingButton
test-method.description: Verify Continue Shopping button is visible

test-method.name: verifyContinueShoppingNavigates
test-method.description: Verify Continue Shopping navigates to homepage

test-method.name: verifyEmptyCartMessage
test-method.description: Verify empty cart message displayed

test-method.name: verifyHomeToCartNavigation
test-method.description: Verify navigation from homepage to cart

test-method.name: verifyLoginPromptOnCart
test-method.description: Verify login prompt shown on cart page

test-method.name: verifyPricesOnCart
test-method.description: Verify prices are displayed on cart page

test-method.name: verifyCreateAccountLinkPresent
test-method.description: Verify Create Account link is present

test-method.name: verifyEmptyMobileNumber
test-method.description: Submit empty mobile number and verify error

test-method.name: verifyInvalidMobileNumber
test-method.description: Enter invalid mobile number and verify error

test-method.name: verifyLoginButtonClickOpensLogin
test-method.description: Verify clicking login button opens login

test-method.name: verifyLoginButtonVisible
test-method.description: Verify login button visible in header

test-method.name: verifyLoginPageLoads
test-method.description: Verify login page loads after clicking login

test-method.name: verifyLoginPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify login page has correct title

test-method.name: verifyLoginUrl
test-method.description: Verify login page URL is correct

test-method.name: verifyMobileInputPresent
test-method.description: Verify mobile/email input is present

test-method.name: verifyPrivacyPolicyLinkPresent
test-method.description: Verify Privacy Policy link is present

test-method.name: verifyRequestOtpButtonPresent
test-method.description: Verify Request OTP button is present

test-method.name: verifyTermsOfUseLinkPresent
test-method.description: Verify Terms of Use link is present

test-method.name: verifyValidMobileNumber
test-method.description: Enter valid mobile number and verify OTP screen

test-method.name: verifyBackNavigationFromWishlist
test-method.description: Verify back navigation from wishlist

test-method.name: verifyLoginPromptOnWishlist
test-method.description: Verify login prompt shown on wishlist page

test-method.name: verifyWishlistAccessibleFromSearch
test-method.description: Verify wishlist accessible from search page

test-method.name: verifyWishlistIconClick
test-method.description: Verify wishlist icon click navigates

test-method.name: verifyWishlistIconVisible
test-method.description: Verify wishlist icon visible in header

test-method.name: verifyWishlistPageTitle
test-method.description: Verify wishlist page has correct title

test-method.name: verifyWishlistRedirectsToLogin
test-method.description: Verify wishlist redirects to login for guest

test-method.name: verifyWishlistTextVisible
test-method.description: Verify wishlist text visible in header

test-method.name: verifyBackButtonNavigation
test-method.description: Verify back button works correctly

test-method.name: verifyElectronicsCategoryNavigation
test-method.description: Click Electronics category and verify page

test-method.name: verifyFashionCategoryNavigation
test-method.description: Click Fashion category and verify page

test-method.name: verifyFooterLinksPresent
test-method.description: Verify footer links are present

test-method.name: verifyHelpCenterNavigation
test-method.description: Verify Help Center link navigates

test-method.name: verifyLogoClickGoesToHomepage
test-method.description: Verify Flipkart logo click goes to homepage

test-method.name: verifyMobilesCategoryNavigation
test-method.description: Click Mobiles category and verify page

test-method.name: verifyOrdersNavigation
test-method.description: Verify Orders link navigates correctly

test-method.name: verifyPageTitleChanges
test-method.description: Verify page title changes on navigation

test-method.name: verifyFooterPresent
test-method.description: Verify footer is present on homepage

test-method.name: verifyLayoutOn1366x768
test-method.description: Verify layout on 1366x768 resolution

test-method.name: verifyLayoutOn1920x1080
test-method.description: Verify layout on 1920x1080 resolution

test-method.name: verifyNoBrokenImages
test-method.description: Verify no broken images on homepage

test-method.name: verifyNoHorizontalScroll
test-method.description: Verify page has no horizontal scroll

test-method.name: verifyPageTitleNotEmpty
test-method.description: Verify page title is not empty

test-method.name: verifyScrollToTop
test-method.description: Verify scroll to top works

test-method.name: verifyCartPageLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify cart page loads under 10 seconds

test-method.name: verifyDomLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify DOM loads within acceptable time

test-method.name: verifyHomepageLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify homepage loads under 10 seconds

test-method.name: verifyLoginPageLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify login page loads under 10 seconds

test-method.name: verifyPageResourcesLoaded
test-method.description: Verify all page resources loaded

test-method.name: verifyPageResponseTime
test-method.description: Verify page response time using JS timing

test-method.name: verifyProductPageLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify product page loads under 15 seconds

test-method.name: verifySearchResultsLoadTime
test-method.description: Verify search results load under 30 seconds
